stack_layers.role: Local workstation access and fallback control
stack_layers.notes: Must remain independent from cloud login/provider changes.

stack_layers.role: Front-door identity gate for exposed AI_OS surfaces
stack_layers.notes: Dashboard exposure remains blocked until Access policy is proven.
Requires identity inventory, recovery review, and break-glass design before setup.

stack_layers.role: Backup operator login provider candidate and repo identity
stack_layers.notes: Must not bypass AI_OS app roles or protected-action approval gates.
Use only if it improves lockout resilience without unmanaged account sprawl.
Should not depend on the same reset loop as primary Microsoft login.

stack_layers.role: Bot/human check on AI_OS login or sensitive forms
stack_layers.notes: Token must be server-verified in future implementation.
External login identity does not equal app role or action authority.
Validator PASS and authenticated login do not approve protected actions.

azure_portal_browser_identity.purpose: Azure Portal administration after separate approval

azure_cli_identity.warning: Previous identity should not be used for production AI_OS cloud resources unless separately approved.

github_identity.purpose: Repo/operator identity and backup Access login candidate

cloudflare_admin_identity.purpose: Cloudflare Access, DNS, tunnel, and Turnstile administration after approval

aios_admin_identity.purpose: AI_OS app administration after backend role checks
aios_admin_identity.rule: Separate from cloud provider, repo, and local machine authority.

aios_end_user_identity.purpose: End-user authentication with user-owned provider account
aios_end_user_identity.rule: End users do not touch Azure admin, Omen login, GitHub repo, scheduler, runtime, broker, or secrets.

recovery_email.requirement: Must be separate from the primary Microsoft reset loop.

break_glass_account.requirement: Must be independently recoverable and not used for daily work or end users.

lockout_controls.recovery_email_rule: Recovery email must be separate from the primary Microsoft account.
lockout_controls.break_glass_rule: Break-glass account must not depend on the same Microsoft reset loop.
lockout_controls.dashboard_exposure_rule: Dashboard remains blocked until Cloudflare Access is proven.

scenario_recovery.path: Use GitHub backup login or break-glass; keep local Omen fallback.
Stop Azure mutation and run identity inventory only.
Use break-glass or alternate Cloudflare admin path; keep dashboard unexposed.
Use local Omen fallback and independent Cloudflare admin path; repair only through approved provider-change packet.

end_user_model.authentication: End users authenticate with their own provider account.
end_user_model.authorization: AI_OS backend maps verified sessions to explicit app roles.
end_user_model.rule: Login identity does not equal action authority.

next_packet.purpose: Inventory identity and recovery facts before provider configuration.
